about.meta_desc: Discover WineHouse Da Nang's 25-year journey — a passion for wine, rigorous selection process, and an unwavering commitment to quality.
about.hero_subtitle: From the sun-drenched slopes of Tuscany to the coastal breeze of Da Nang, we bring the world's finest vintages to your table.
about.journey_p1: Founded in the heart of Da Nang, WineHouse began with a single mission: to bring the world's most exquisite vintages to the shores of Vietnam. Our journey is one of master sommeliers, ensuring that every unwavering commitment to the art of wine selection.
about.journey_p2: We don't just sell bottles; we curate experiences. Each vintage in our collection is hand-selected by our master sommeliers, ensuring that every sip tells a story of the soil, the climate, and the craft of the winemaker.
about.selection_subtitle: Only 1 in every 50 wines tasted makes it into the WineHouse Da Nang private cellar.
about.terroir_desc: We travel to remote estates to find winemakers who respect the land and traditional methods.
about.blind_desc: Every bottle is subjected to rigorous blind tasting sessions by our expert panel to ensure objective excellence.
about.storage_desc: Our Da Nang cellar features state-of-the-art climate control to preserve the integrity of every drop.
about.gallery_main_desc: Da Nang's largest collection of European vintages.
about.visit_subtitle: Experience our collection in person at our flagship Da Nang boutique.
about.location_value: To Huu Street, Da Nang City, Vietnam

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.updated: Last updated: March 21, 2026 · Viora Wine is committed to protecting the privacy and personal information of our customers in accordance with Vietnamese law.
privacy_policy.section1_content:
Viora Wine collects personal information when you place an order, register an account, or contact us, including:

• Full name, phone number, email address
• Delivery address and payment information
• Order history and product preferences
• Device information and website behavior (cookies, IP address)
privacy_policy.section2_content:
Your information is used to:

• Process orders and deliver to the correct address
• Verify age as required by law (18+ for alcoholic beverages)
• Send notifications about orders, promotions, and membership programs
• Improve service quality and shopping experience
• Comply with legal requirements related to the sale of alcohol
privacy_policy.section3_content:
Viora Wine is committed to not selling, renting, or exchanging your personal information with third parties for commercial purposes. We only share information in these cases:

• With delivery companies to fulfill shipments
• With payment gateways to process transactions securely
• When required by competent state authorities under applicable law
privacy_policy.section4_content:
We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure, including:

• Data transmission encryption (SSL/TLS)
• Internal access control based on the principle of minimum privilege
• Regular system monitoring to detect anomalies
privacy_policy.section5_content:
The website uses cookies to remember your login session, shopping cart, and preferences. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, however some website features may be affected.

We also use analytics cookies (Google Analytics) to track traffic in order to improve our service.
privacy_policy.section6_content:
You have the right to:

• Request to view, edit, or delete personal information
• Opt out of marketing emails at any time
• Object to data processing in certain circumstances

To exercise these rights, please contact us via email or hotline.
privacy_policy.section7_content: This privacy policy may be updated periodically. Any significant changes will be notified via email or a prominent notice on the website. Last updated: March 21, 2026.
privacy_policy.contact_desc: If you have questions about our privacy policy, please contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.updated: Last updated: March 21, 2026 · Please read these terms carefully before using Viora Wine's services.
terms.intro: By accessing and using the website viorawine.vn, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions. If you do not agree to any of these terms, please do not use the website.
terms.section1_content:
Viora Wine sells alcoholic beverages. By accessing and using the website, you confirm that:

• You are 18 years of age or older as required by Vietnamese law
• Selling alcohol to persons under 18 is illegal and strictly prohibited
• Viora Wine reserves the right to refuse delivery if the recipient is suspected to be underage
terms.section2_content:
You agree to use the website for lawful purposes and not to:

• Provide false information when placing orders
• Copy or redistribute website content without permission
• Attack, interfere with, or disrupt system operations
• Use bots or crawlers to collect data illegally
terms.section3_content:
When placing an order at Viora Wine:

• Orders are only confirmed after successful payment or verbal confirmation by our staff via phone/Zalo
• Product prices are listed in VND and may change without prior notice
• We accept bank transfers, cash on delivery, and valid e-wallets
• Viora Wine reserves the right to cancel orders if fraudulent information or violations are detected
terms.section4_content:
• Nationwide delivery through reputable carriers
• Delivery time: 1–3 days (Da Nang city), 3–7 days (other provinces)
• Shipping fees are calculated based on delivery address and order weight
• We are not responsible for risks beyond our control (natural disasters, strikes, etc.)
• The recipient must be 18 or older; delivery staff may request ID verification
terms.section5_content:
Viora Wine accepts returns in the following cases:

• Products damaged or leaking during shipping (must report within 24 hours of receipt)
• Products delivered incorrectly compared to the placed order
• Expired products

Returns are NOT accepted when:
• Products have been opened or partially consumed
• The 24-hour reporting period has passed without valid evidence
terms.section6_content: All content on the Viora Wine website — including text, images, logos, videos, and designs — is the property of Viora Wine and is protected by Vietnamese Intellectual Property Law. Copying, using, or redistributing in any form without written consent is strictly prohibited.
terms.section7_content:
Viora Wine provides services on an "as is" basis. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for:

• Indirect damages arising from improper use of products
• Content from third-party websites linked on our website
• Service interruptions due to technical issues beyond our control
terms.section8_content: These terms are governed by Vietnamese law. Any disputes shall first be resolved through negotiation. If no agreement is reached, the dispute will be submitted to the competent People's Court in Da Nang.
terms.section9_content: Viora Wine may update these terms of use at any time. The latest version is always published on the website. Continued use of the service after updates constitutes acceptance of the changes. Last updated: March 21, 2026.
terms.contact_desc: If you have questions about our terms of use, we are happy to help:

shopping_guide.title: Shopping Guide
shopping_guide.updated: Last updated: March 21, 2026 · Viora Wine guides you through each step to shop easily and quickly.
shopping_guide.section1_content:
Visit viorawine.vn and browse our product categories:

• Products page: view all wines, whisky, and spirits
• Search by name, origin, or price range
• Click on each product to view details, description, and pricing
• Contact hotline 033.890.9973 or chat via Zalo for expert advice before purchasing
shopping_guide.section2_content:
Once you've found what you're looking for:

• Click "Buy Now" or "Chat Zalo" on the product page
• Provide your details: full name, phone number, delivery address
• Select quantity and add special notes (gift wrapping, engraving, etc.)
• Confirm your order with our advisor via Zalo or phone
shopping_guide.section3_content:
You can also order directly through:

• Zalo: message us at 033.890.9973 — send a photo or product name
• Hotline: call 033.890.9973 for instant advice and ordering
• Our team will confirm your order, quote the price, and arrange delivery within 30 minutes
shopping_guide.section4_content:
After placing your order:

• Our staff will call or message via Zalo to confirm within 15–30 minutes
• Payment options: bank transfer, cash on delivery (COD), or e-wallets (MoMo, ZaloPay)
• Once confirmed and paid, your order will be processed and dispatched as soon as possible
shopping_guide.section5_content:
When receiving your delivery:

• Check the packaging and seal are intact
• Verify the products match your order (name, quantity, wine type)
• Check the expiry date and bottle condition
• If an issue is found, refuse delivery and contact Viora Wine immediately via hotline
shopping_guide.contact_desc: Our Viora Wine advisory team is available 24/7:

shipping_policy.title: Shipping Policy
shipping_policy.updated: Last updated: March 21, 2026 · Viora Wine is committed to fast, safe nationwide delivery.
shipping_policy.section1_content:
Viora Wine delivers nationwide across all 63 provinces and cities:

• Da Nang city: same-day delivery or flexible time slots
• Other provinces: delivered via trusted carriers (GHN, GHTK, J&T Express)
• Remote areas may require an additional 1–2 days depending on carrier conditions
shipping_policy.section2_content:
Estimated delivery time after order confirmation:

• Da Nang city: 2–4 hours (during business hours 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM)
• Central Vietnam (Hue, Hoi An, Quang Nam): 1–2 business days
• Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City: 2–3 business days
• Other provinces: 3–5 business days

Orders placed before 3:00 PM are processed the same day. Orders after 3:00 PM are processed on the next business day.
shipping_policy.section3_content:
Shipping fees are calculated based on delivery location and order weight:

• Da Nang city: free shipping on orders from 500,000 VND
• Other provinces: 30,000 – 80,000 VND depending on region and weight
• Orders over 2,000,000 VND: free nationwide shipping
• Express delivery (Da Nang city): 50,000 – 80,000 VND per trip
shipping_policy.section4_content:
Viora Wine takes special care in packaging to protect your products:

• Bottles are wrapped in PE foam and placed in dedicated cardboard boxes
• Gift orders are packed in wooden boxes or premium paper bags as requested
• Security seals are applied to ensure product integrity
• Multi-bottle orders are separated by individual cardboard dividers
shipping_policy.section5_content:
After your order is handed to the carrier:

• You will receive a tracking code via Zalo or SMS
• Track your order directly on the carrier's website (GHN, GHTK, J&T)
• Call hotline 033.890.9973 for tracking assistance
• Our staff will proactively contact you when your order is about to arrive
shipping_policy.contact_desc: Questions about delivery? Please contact us:

inspection_policy.title: Inspection Policy
inspection_policy.updated: Last updated: March 21, 2026 · Viora Wine encourages customers to inspect all products carefully before signing for delivery.
inspection_policy.section1_title: 1. Your Right to Inspect Before Accepting
inspection_policy.section1_content:
Viora Wine respects your rights as a customer. You have the full right to inspect your products before signing without any pressure from the delivery staff:

• Ask the delivery person to wait while you inspect
• Open the carton box to directly examine the products
• Take photos if needed as documentation
• Refuse delivery if an issue is found and contact Viora Wine immediately
inspection_policy.section2_content:
When receiving your order, carefully check the following:

• Packaging & seal: carton box not dented or crushed, security seal intact
• Correct product: verify the name, brand, and volume match your order
• Correct quantity: count all bottles/units as per order confirmation
• Bottle condition: no cracks, breakage, or leakage; cork or screw cap is secure
• Expiry date: check the production date and best-before date on the label or bottle bottom
• Label condition: label not torn, damp, faded, or showing any suspicious signs
inspection_policy.section3_title: 3. What to Do When a Problem Is Found
inspection_policy.section3_content:
If you find an issue during inspection:

• Refuse to sign for the order immediately and ask the delivery person to note the condition
• Take photos and video as on-site evidence
• Call hotline 033.890.9973 or message Zalo immediately to report the issue
• Viora Wine will arrange a replacement or refund within 24–48 business hours

Note: Issues must be reported at the time of delivery. Viora Wine will not resolve packaging-related complaints after the order has been signed for.
inspection_policy.section4_content:
Viora Wine guarantees:

• 100% products with clear origin and valid import documentation
• Products stored in a warehouse meeting temperature and humidity standards
• Strict packaging procedures to minimize damage during transit
• All customer feedback and complaints are addressed within 24 business hours
inspection_policy.contact_desc: Found an issue? Contact us immediately for assistance:

return_policy.title: Return Policy
return_policy.updated: Last updated: March 21, 2026 · Viora Wine is committed to handling returns quickly and transparently.
return_policy.section1_content:
Viora Wine accepts returns in the following cases:

• Products broken, leaking, or damaged during shipping
• Wrong product delivered compared to the placed order (wrong name, volume, or vintage)
• Expired products or products close to expiry (less than 3 months remaining)
• Products showing signs of counterfeiting or abnormal labeling
return_policy.section2_content:
Viora Wine does NOT accept returns in the following cases:

• Products that have been opened or partially consumed
• The 24-hour reporting window has passed without valid evidence
• Customer dislikes the taste or aroma (this is a natural characteristic of wine)
• Products damaged due to improper storage after receipt
• Products purchased as part of a special combo/promotion clearly marked as non-returnable
return_policy.section3_content:
To initiate a return, please follow these steps:

Step 1: Contact Viora Wine within 24 hours of receiving your order via hotline 033.890.9973 or Zalo
Step 2: Provide your order information, describe the issue, and share photos/video as evidence
Step 3: Our staff will confirm your request and arrange product pickup (if needed)
Step 4: Viora Wine reviews and processes: sends replacement or issues a refund
Step 5: Receive your replacement product or refund via the agreed method
return_policy.section4_content:
Return processing timeline:

• Request acknowledgment: within 2 business hours of submission
• Replacement delivery (Da Nang city): same day or within 24 hours
• Replacement delivery (other provinces): 2–5 business days
• Refund (bank transfer): 1–3 business days after return confirmation
• Refund (cash): arrange in-person or as agreed
return_policy.section5_content:
• Viora Wine's fault (wrong product, shipping damage): Viora Wine covers all return shipping costs
• Customer's fault (wrong product ordered): customer covers return shipping costs
• Refund cases: 100% product value refunded, no handling fee
return_policy.contact_desc: Need help with a return? Contact us immediately:

payment_policy.title: Payment Policy
payment_policy.updated: Last updated: March 21, 2026 · Viora Wine offers flexible, secure, and convenient payment options.
payment_policy.section1_content:
Viora Wine accepts the following payment methods:

• Bank transfer (before delivery)
• Cash on Delivery (COD)
• E-wallets: MoMo, ZaloPay, VNPay
• QR Code payment (VietQR)

For orders over 5,000,000 VND, we recommend bank transfer for security and priority processing.
payment_policy.section2_content:
Bank account details for transfers:

• Bank: Vietcombank – Da Nang Branch
• Account Number: 1234 5678 9012
• Account Holder: VIORA WINE CO., LTD
• Transfer note: [Full Name] – [Phone Number] – [Order Code]

After transferring, please send a screenshot of the transaction via Zalo 033.890.9973 so we can confirm and process your order.
payment_policy.section3_content:
COD is available for:

• Orders delivered within Da Nang city and surrounding areas
• Orders valued under 10,000,000 VND
• First-time customers (a 30% deposit may be required)

Please inspect your products before making payment. Once paid and signed for, Viora Wine is not responsible for unsubstantiated complaints.
payment_policy.section4_content:
Accepted e-wallets:

• MoMo: scan QR or transfer to number 033.890.9973
• ZaloPay: scan QR or transfer to Zalo number 033.890.9973
• VNPay: use the VNPay QR provided at checkout

After a successful payment, the system automatically records the transaction and our staff will confirm your order within 15 minutes.
payment_policy.section5_content:
Viora Wine is committed to securing your payment information:

• All transactions are processed through secure channels — we never store bank card information
• Viora Wine will never ask for OTP codes or bank passwords via phone or message
• If you receive a suspicious request claiming to be from Viora Wine, call hotline 033.890.9973 immediately to verify
• VAT invoices (if required) will be issued within 3 business days upon request
payment_policy.contact_desc: Having a payment issue? Contact us immediately:
